
---
title: "Paper Notes"
listing:
  - id: favorites
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    include:
      favorite: true
    fields: [date, title, categories, description]
    table-striped: true
    table-hover: true
  - id: all
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    categories: true
    fields: [date, title, status, categories, description]
    table-striped: true
    table-hover: true
---



Summaries, key takeaways, and critiques of papers I'm reading.

Use `_template.qmd` as a starting point for new entries.
